scopeSync.summary: Scoped active work to 영역 05 records/result UX: MatchResultInputModal 44px steppers and team-tinted glass rows, RecordsTab glass ranking/summary cards, tier-token medal badges, and deterministic UI tests.

targetedTest.summary: 70 tests passed, including result modal 44px glass steppers/team row tinting and RecordsTab glass ranking, summary segments, and tier-token medal badge classes.

lint.summary: ESLint passed as part of baseline verification.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript passed for MatchResultInputModal, RecordsTab, and UI test changes.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 230 tests passed, 15 skipped.

build.summary: Production build passed with build-time public Supabase env.

retrospective.issuesObserved: The existing result modal used 24px stepper buttons, so applying the PRD literally required widening the stats columns to avoid cramped 44px targets.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Manual mobile visual QA for tap accuracy and light-mode contrast was not run; deterministic tests cover the 44px class contract and glass/tier token usage.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider extracting the result input modal into a focused fixture test so touch-target regressions are not verified only through the large ScheduleTab integration path.
retrospective.reason: The records/result changes are section-specific UI styling and touch-target work covered by deterministic tests; no durable harness rule promotion is needed.
